title: CRM Emails added automatically from Gmail account
excerpt: Somewhere, somehow, I have clicked on a box that is enabling all email addresses to be imported as Contacts into my CRM.  How do I stop this?  I have no automations set up that I can find that would be causing this.  Hel…

posts.author: colleen928 (Colleen Bonniol)
posts.cookedHtml: Somewhere, somehow, I have clicked on a box that is enabling all email addresses to be imported as Contacts into my CRM. How do I stop this? I have no automations set up that I can find that would be causing this. Help!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @colleen928!

Are you currently using the Emails & Activities App? It sounds like this particular option is selected which is logging all new emails as new contacts in your board:

Screen Shot 2023-04-19 at 10.42.27 am848×968 71.5 KB

If this is the case on your end, you can simply adjust these settings to log all or specific emails in the app!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Glad to hear you’ve sorted it! No problem
